articles.title: Playbook: Invite a New User
articles.content: {"intent":"user.invite","description":"A playbook for inviting a new user to a space.","preconditions":["user_is_space_admin"],"steps":[{"step":"open_settings","description":"Navigate to the Settings page."},{"step":"go_to_users_tab","description":"Select the 'Users & Permissions' tab."},{"step":"click_invite_user","description":"Click the 'Invite User' button."},{"step":"fill_invite_form","description":"Fill out the user's email, select their role and spaces."},{"step":"send_invite","description":"Click 'Invite User' to send the invitation."}],"fallbacks":[{"case":"user_not_admin","response":"It looks like you don't have admin permissions to invite users. You should ask a space administrator to invite them for you."}],"escalation_after":1}
